title: Best of Atlanta Comedy Showcase — Laughing Skull Lounge
description: Laugh until your face hurts at Atlanta's premier comedy club. The Saturday night showcase features 4–6 of the city's best stand-up comics. Doors open at 7:30 PM, show starts at 8 PM. 21+ only. Great date energy — close tables, dark room, big laughs. Afterparty potential at nearby East Atlanta Village bars.
location: Laughing Skull Lounge, 878-1 Main St, Atlanta (East Atlanta Village) — Sat Apr 25, 8 PM
vibe: Intimate, hilarious, high-energy — perfect for a couple who loves to laugh

title: Nonsense ATL — Atlanta Disco Society Night
description: Atlanta Disco Society is back with a glamour-and-disco night at Wild Heaven Beer. Dress to impress, hit the dance floor, lose yourself in 70s–80s disco grooves. 10 PM – 3 AM. Pull up with your best moves or learn on the floor — either way, it's a memorable night out. Great for couples who love to dance and dress up.
location: Wild Heaven Beer, 1200 Innovation Dr, Atlanta — Sat Apr 25, 10 PM–3 AM
vibe: Glamorous, retro-disco, high-energy dancing — velvet rope energy

title: Paint a Butterfly Together — Painting with a Twist
description: A guided 2-hour painting session where you and your partner create matching 16x20 canvases. No experience needed — the instructor walks you through every step. BYOB friendly.
is Sunday at 7 PM — take your pick. Super low-pressure, super cute date activity.
location: Painting with a Twist, 1230 Caroline St NE, Atlanta — Sat Apr 25, 12 PM or Sun Apr 26, 7 PM
vibe: Creative, chill, wholesome — couples who create together, stay together
